strengths: Hands-on contributor to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq, directly aligned with the role's agentic AI architecture mandate

Deep distributed-systems and event-driven experience: micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby, event-driven Geo-Data platform on Kubernetes, and fintech work at RIDE Capital reshaping German investment infrastructure

Founder-level ownership track record (GISCollective since 2016) plus craftsmanship discipline — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development — and a strong teaching/workshop history that supports building senior technical leadership layers
concerns: Resume title is Senior/Staff Software Engineer with no explicit CTO or VP-level role, and no documented experience scaling teams from 10 to 30+
Production multi-agent AI system experience is described at infrastructure/tooling level rather than operating customer-facing agentic systems at scale
Fintech exposure (RIDE Capital ~15 months) is meaningful but lighter on credit risk, liquidity, and multi-jurisdiction regulatory depth called for in the JD
response.justification: Bogdan offers a rare combination directly relevant to this CTO mandate: current hands-on work on agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, proven distributed-systems chops from operating microservices at millions-of-RPS scale at Dunnhumby, and direct fintech exposure from RIDE Capital where he helped reshape German investment infrastructure using disciplined engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based). His founder experience with GISCollective demonstrates end-to-end architectural ownership of an event-driven, Kubernetes-deployed platform, while his prolific workshop and teaching history signals the kind of leader who can grow a senior technical-leadership layer — making him a credible upside candidate worth advancing to deeper conversations.
